steps.t: Klátha is located in a camp north of Bazanmanar. Nósni has asked you to speak to Klátha once more.
Nósni is located in a garden north of Bazanmanar. You should talk to Nósni.
The fireworks are located in a garden north of Bazanmanar. You should light the fireworks.
Nósni is located in a garden north of Bazanmanar. You should talk to Nósni.
Klátha is located in a camp north of Bazanmanar. Nósni has asked you to speak to Klátha for a final time.
